title: Oscars Predictions via Feinberg Forecast: Scott's Final Picks
text: Scott Feinberg, The Hollywood Reporter's Executive Editor of Awards, projects the following order of finish for Best Production Design: 1. Frankenstein (Netflix) with designers Tamara Deverell and Shane Vieau, 2. Sinners (Warner Bros.) with designers Hannah Beachler and Monique Champagne, 3. Marty Supreme (A24) with designers Jack Fisk and Adam Willis, 4. Hamnet (Focus) with designers Fiona Crombie and Alice Felton, 5. One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) with designers Anthony Carlino and Florencia Martin. Feinberg bases his forecasts on screening films, analyzing campaigns, consulting with voters, and studying relevant historical patterns and statistics. He notes that his predictions reflect what Academy members are likely to do, rather than his personal preferences for what should win.
